General.Name: Ling Yue Svcs Grp Ltd
General.Description: Ling Yue Services Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides property management, value-added, and community value-added services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers property management services, including security services, cleaning and greening services, and repair and maintenance services to property owners, residents, property developers, and tenants in non-residential properties. It also manages a diverse portfolio of properties, including residential, commercial, public, and other properties. In addition, the company provides value-added services, such as preliminary planning and design consultancy, sales office management, pre-delivery, repair and maintenance, property transaction assistance, and security support services to non-property owners; and community value-added services comprising community space management, decoration and turnkey furnishing, convenient living, and community retail services to property owners and residents. Ling Yue Services Group Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Chengdu, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Leading International Finance Center, Chengdu, China
